---
title: "Tree families — Index"
toc: true
---

{{< include ../_tree-search.qmd >}}

# Tree families

- [Betulaceae (Birch family)](/trees/family/betulaceae.html) — 3 species
- [Oleaceae (Olive family)](/trees/family/oleaceae.html) — 3 species
- [Pinaceae (Pine family)](/trees/family/pinaceae.html) — 1 species
